name: Reconnaissance Activity Using BuiltIn Commands
notes:
This rule detects the execution of a set of builtin commands often used in recon stages by different attack groups

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: juju4
SIGMA Title: Quick Execution of a Series of Suspicious Commands
SIGMA Description: Detects multiple suspicious process in a limited timeframe


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'arp.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'attrib.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'dsquery.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'hostname.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'ipconfig.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'nbtstat.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'net.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'netsh.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'nslookup.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'ping.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'quser.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'qwinsta.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'reg.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'runas.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'sc.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'schtasks.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'systeminfo.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'telnet.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'tracert.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'xcopy.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'pscp.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'copy.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'robocopy.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'certutil.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'wbadmin.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'icacls.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'diskpart.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'tasklist.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'whoami.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'qprocess.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'netstat.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'net1.exe' AQL filter query
when at least 5 events are seen with the same Source Address in 1 minutes
thresholds: when at least 5 events are seen with the same Source Address in 1 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Reconnaissance Activity Using BuiltIn Commands on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'arp.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'attrib.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'dsquery.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'hostname.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'ipconfig.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'nbtstat.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'net.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'netsh.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'nslookup.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'ping.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'quser.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'qwinsta.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'reg.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'runas.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'sc.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'schtasks.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'systeminfo.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'telnet.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'tracert.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'xcopy.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'pscp.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'copy.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'robocopy.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'certutil.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'wbadmin.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'icacls.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'diskpart.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'tasklist.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'whoami.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'qprocess.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'netstat.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'net1.exe' AQL filter query
AND when at least 5 events are seen with the same Source Address in 1 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Reconnaissance Activity Using BuiltIn Commands
Event description: Detects the execution of a set of builtin commands often used in recon stages by different attack groups
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
